title: MFTBC and Foxconn to Create New Bus OEM in Japan to Accelerate Zero-Emission Buses
content: Mitsubishi Fuso Truck and Bus Corporation (MFTBC) and Hon Hai Technology Group (Foxconn) have announced plans to establish a standalone bus company in Japan, targeting launch in the second half of 2026. This joint venture combines MFTBCâ€™s 90-year heritage in bus design and manufacturing with Foxconnâ€™s expertise in Zero-Emission Vehicle (ZEV) technology and global supply chains. Headquartered in Kawasaki with manufacturing in Toyama, the new OEM will focus on rapidly developing competitive electric busesâ€”starting with Foxtronâ€™s MODEL T and MODEL Uâ€”while continuing to improve the existing diesel lineup. The collaboration aims to shorten development cycles and ensure compliance with Japanese regulations, positioning the FUSO brand to lead the transition to electrification and digitalization in public transport for both domestic and international markets.
author: Analysts Account
